response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience as a full-stack engineer with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and has worked on various projects that demonstrate their technical skills and problem-solving abilities.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with full-stack development and various tech stacks
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
No explicit mention of experience with AI agent development
Some skills like Kotlin/Java are not extensively highlighted

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct Nest.js and Vitest experience
